title: Introduction to GIS
Advanced Spatial Analysis
Web Mapping with Leaflet & Mapbox
Remote Sensing Fundamentals
description: Learn the fundamentals of Geographic Information Systems: coordinate systems, data models, spatial analysis, and cartography. Hands-on with QGIS.
Master spatial statistics, interpolation, terrain analysis, and geoprocessing using ArcGIS Pro and Python scripting.
Build interactive web maps using Leaflet.js, GeoJSON, and custom basemaps. Learn front-end GIS integration and responsive map design.
Satellite imagery, multispectral analysis, NDVI, land cover classification using Sentinel and Landsat data. Practical exercises.
